Element-built approximation of source PDF page 3.

objects.text:
Migrate France legal entity accounting processes and data from Sage to Global Oracle Fusion Platform

AND

Migrate remaining France active customer contracts to Docusign EMEA (Global Oracle Fusion Platform)
By migrating the France legal entity and customer contracts to Global Oracle Fusion Platform, we will:

items: **Decommission legacy systems** by retiring the local Sage ERP
**Mitigate compliance risks** through globalized AP workflows, improved SODs, and standardized global SOX controls
**Standardize financial reporting** by aligning R2R process under a unified global chart of accounts
**Enable data transparency** with real-time access to DS France accounts for the corporate and FP&A teams
**Drive operational efficiency** by automating accounting workflows and eliminating manual reporting

pages.notes: Element-built approximation of source PDF page 5.
Divider rebuilt with Docusign pale background, corner line treatment, footer and positioned section title primitives.

objects.text:
Localized Compliance
Deployment of mandatory e-invoicing solutions specifically for French statutory requirements.

Grant Thornton will lead this workstream

DS France to DS EMEA
Active contract migration from DS France to DS EMEA legal entity.

Docusign will lead this workstream. More insights to be provided in the upcoming scope commit.

objects.text: Establish a clear solution design to support French GAAP and statutory requirements within Oracle.
Ensure alignment with Docusign’s global Oracle architecture and US GAAP priorities.
Define key decisions, gaps, localization needs, and integration impacts before implementation.
Create a high-level roadmap, resource plan, and future-state architecture for the France rollout.

Grant Thornton will drive the discovery for the French localization assessment to ensure both US GAAP and French GAAP requirements are supported within one single, compliant, and efficient Oracle solution.
Establish a clear solution design to support French GAAP and statutory requirements within Oracle.
Ensure alignment with Docusign's global Oracle architecture and US GAAP priorities.
Define key decisions, gaps, localization needs, and integration impacts before implementation.
Create a high-level roadmap, resource plan, and future-state architecture for the France rollout.

objects.text:
• Identify impacts and challenges in implementing Oracle for France
• Review the overall processes that may be impacted by France implementation

• Confirm scope
• Assess overall impacts and challenges: enterprise design, Primary ledgers / COA structure & secondary ledger, multi-GAAP requirements, SLA rules, intercompany invoicing, fixed assets & P2P compliance, project accounting, reporting tools...
• Assess the impact of French localization by comparing current global oracle ERP processes with existing French processes
• Facilitate workshops
• Identify gaps with the core model
• Provide a global Impact Assessment report & integration recommendations

• Review and analyze French-specific requirements and their impact on the global system
• Ensure compliance with French statutory, tax, regulatory, and banking requirements

• Define and analyze the best target solution that will meet the French requirements
• Perform a Fit-Gap analysis to assess which French localization requirements can be supported natively in Oracle SaaS versus those requiring localization extensions:
- Tax & statutory reporting
- VAT scenarios
- E-invoicing / e-reporting
- Banking requirements
- Compliance rules
• Provide a High-Level Solution design and gap assessment on the French Statutory, Tax, Regulatory & Audit Requirements
• Drive key business decisions required to support French localization in oracle ERP

• Design solution for France by listing the KDD (Key Design Decisions) to be validated & prepare arbitration committee to select the best solution based on criteria (cost, standard oriented, scalability, etc.)
• Topics to be covered:
- Ledger Strategy review
- COA Alignment
- Decision Documentation
- Reporting Needs
• Formalize key business / Design decisions (KBD/KDD) and ledger strategy / COA alignment recommendations
• Identify and assess key data migration & integration considerations specific to French requirements

• Review all topics related to data migration and integration considerations specific to France
• Topics to be reviewed:
- Data Migration analysis
- Integration catalog
- Technical Scope Assessment
- Banking and Payment Review
- Payroll integration
- Documentation and Training
• Provide data migration recommendations and the required downstream integrations list
• Develop a high-level implementation roadmap and plan for French Localization

• Based on the different elements collected in the Gap Analysis for France, define the high-level implementation roadmap and resource plan for French Localization
Topics to be included:
- Implementation Plan
- Resource Plan
- Risk Management
- Future Architecture Recommendations
- Stakeholder Alignment
• Review and analyze French-specific requirements and their impact on the global system

• Evaluate readiness for e-invoicing and e-reporting mandates for France's B2G and B2B transactions:
• Invoicing applicative landscape
- As-is applicative landscape
- To-be applicative landscape
- Certified platforms Benchmark
• Invoicing required data & use cases
- Main P2P use cases
- Main Intercompany invoicing use cases
- E-invoicing data review (+400 fields for e-invoicing analysis)
• Provide a high-level recommendation on France e-invoicing and supporting tool, based on benchmark and REX from France

objects.text: Accountable for overall execution, risk management/escalation, communication to FBT leadership, portfolio owner and supporting team members. Drives Solution Design, BRDs, UAT and Hypercare planning.

objects.text: KEY BUSINESS DECISIONS FOR FRENCH LOCALIZATION
Drive key business decisions required to support French localization in Oracle ERP

• Design solution for France: list KDDs to be validated and prepare arbitration committees.
• Ledger Strategy Review: entity structure, ledger design, legal reporting and multi-GAAP considerations.
• COA Alignment: align global COA with Plan Comptable Général.
• Decision Documentation: document all key business decisions.
• Reporting Needs: identify additional reporting or analytics requirements.

Prerequisites
• Access to current COA and ledger structures
• Participation of management for strategic decisions

Cost drivers
• 4 Workshops – 2 hours each
• 1 KDD validation meeting

items: Key Business Decisions and Key Design Decisions: details, pros and cons and recommended decisions
Recommendations for ledger strategy and COA alignment

pages.notes: Element-built approximation of source PDF page 26.

meta.title: Detailed Approach - Key Business Decisions for French Localization

objects.text: LOCAL DATA & INTEGRATION ASSESSMENT & IMPACT ANALYSIS
Identify key data migration and integration considerations specific to French requirements

• Organize workshops on data migration and integrations specific to France.
• Data Migration Analysis: evaluate impact concerning French GAAP and localization requirements.
• Integration Catalog: required downstream integrations including banking APIs and e-invoicing.
• Technical Scope Assessment: technical scope, extension needs and reporting configurations.
• Banking and Payment Review: bank connectivity, formats, approvals and security mandates.
• Payroll Integration and bilingual documentation/training.

Prerequisites
• Existing data migration process documentation
• Availability of technical teams for integration assessments

Cost drivers
• 4 Workshops – 2 hours each
• 1 validation meeting

items: Recommendations on key data migration strategy for French requirements
Required upstream and downstream integration catalog including architecture considerations

meta.title: Detailed Approach - Local Data & Integration Assessment & Impact Analysis

objects.text: Develop an implementation roadmap and plan for French localization
Based on the different elements collected in the Gap Analysis for France, define the implementation roadmap and resource plan. The below topics need to be included in this step :

items: **Implementation Plan:** Build a high-level implementation plan, including roadmap, timeline, key milestones, project phases...
**Resource Plan:** Provide a plan, including the resources required to support Localization
**Risk Management:** Identify potential risks, issues, dependencies and develop mitigation strategies
**Future Architecture Recommendations:** Suggest future state architecture for integration and associated systems
**Stakeholder Alignment:** Ensure all stakeholders are aligned regarding project scope and timelines

objects.text: Organize a validation session to present and to validate the implementation roadmap for French localization.

items: Agreement on project scope and timelines
Availability of resources and budget for implementation
Resource plan with high-level implementation cost estimate

• Invoicing required data and use cases: main P2P, O2C and intercompany use cases.

• Provide high-level recommendation on France e-invoicing and supporting tool.

objects.text:
Migrate French legal entity accounting processes and data from Sage to Global Oracle Fusion

AND

Migrate DS France active customer contracts to DS EMEA
By migrating French legal entity to Global Oracle Fusion, we will be able to:

items: Globalize AP to improve controls and reduce SOD issues
Globalize Record to Report (R2R) process with the same chart of accounts
Provide real time access to DS France accounts to Corporate teams
Automate accounting processes in line with the global process (including billing and revenue)
